assertionResults.title: returns zeros when queue is empty

assertionResults.title: does not call removeSyncItem or updateSyncItemAttempt when empty

assertionResults.title: does not call supabaseService.push when queue is empty

assertionResults.title: removes the sync item after a successful push

assertionResults.title: passes the correct table and operation to supabaseService

assertionResults.title: counts all synced items correctly for multiple successes

assertionResults.title: calls removeSyncItem with each item id

assertionResults.title: increments attempts when push returns ok: false

assertionResults.title: increments attempts when push throws an Error

assertionResults.title: converts non-Error thrown values to string for the error log

assertionResults.title: uses a fallback message when push returns ok:false with no error string

assertionResults.title: continues processing remaining items after a single item fails

assertionResults.title: processes item with attempts = MAX_ATTEMPTS - 1 (last eligible attempt)
